title: Design's inputs are blocked during simulation when using an array as input

features.name: unpacked array as module input
features.description: Code should include a module with an unpacked array used as an input port

features.name: concatenation assignment to unpacked array
features.description: Code should include a concatenation assignment to an unpacked array variable

features.name: unpacked array elements in expression
features.description: Code should include an expression using multiple elements of an unpacked array
